title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For August 2023
text: The ProShares S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrat ETF had a strong month in June with a gain of 8.08%, year-to-date the Fund is up 5.72%. I present 3 strategies that can theoretically beat the dividend aristocrat index in the long term. After nearly two full years of tracking these strategies, all 3 buy-and-hold portfolios continue to generate alpha over NOBL and SPY.

title: Sysco to Release Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2023 Financial Results on August 1
text: HOUSTON, July 11, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) will host a conference call and webcast to discuss its fourth quarter and fiscal year 2023 financial results at 10 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, Aug. 1, 2023.

title: Passive Income: 3 Dividend Kings Worth a Look
